option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/watermelon_light">
<!-- Top bar + search --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/watermelon_red" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="16dp" android:paddingBottom="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" />
<!-- Search bar --> <EditText android:id="@+id/edit_search" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:background="@color/white" android:hint="@string/search_hint" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:inputType="text" android:imeOptions="actionSearch" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:textColorHint="@color/text_secondary" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Main content area --> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="130dp" android:layout_marginBottom="56dp">
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recycler_recipes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" />
</androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>
<!-- FAB — add recipe --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/fab_add_recipe" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|end" android:layout_margin="72dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_input_add" android:contentDescription="Add recipe" app:backgroundTint="@color/watermelon_green" app:tint="@color/white" />
<!-- Bottom navigation --> <com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottom_navigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:background="@color/white" app:menu="@menu/bottom_nav_menu" app:itemIconTint="@color/watermelon_red" app:itemTextColor="@color/watermelon_red" />
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/background_primary">
<!-- Top bar with header --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/header_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="@color/primary_red" android:paddingStart="16dp" android:paddingEnd="16dp" android:paddingTop="24dp" android:paddingBottom="20dp">
<!-- App Title + Greeting --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/app_name" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:letterSpacing="0.02" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_greeting" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/home_greeting_morning" android:textColor="@color/primary_red_light" android:textSize="14sp" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:alpha="0.9" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Search bar with Material 3 styling --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="48dp" android:hint="@string/search_hint" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox" app:boxStrokeColor="@color/white" app:hintTextColor="@color/white" app:startIconDrawable="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search" app:startIconTint="@color/white">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/edit_search" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:inputType="text" android:imeOptions="actionSearch" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textColorHint="@color/primary_red_light" android:paddingStart="8dp" android:paddingEnd="8dp" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Main content area with RecyclerView and empty state --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:layout_marginTop="170dp" android:layout_marginBottom="56dp">
<!-- RecyclerView for recipes --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/recycler_recipes" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:padding="12dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:visibility="visible" />
<!-- Empty state --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/empty_state_container" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:gravity="center" android:padding="32dp" android:visibility="gone">
<ImageView android:layout_width="100dp" android:layout_height="100dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" android:contentDescription="Empty state" android:tint="@color/text_tertiary" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:layout_marginBottom="24dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/empty_state_title" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/empty_state_subtitle" android:textSize="14sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:gravity="center" android:layout_marginBottom="32dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</FrameLayout>
<!-- FAB — add recipe --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/fab_add_recipe" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|end" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_input_add" android:contentDescription="@string/empty_state_action" app:backgroundTint="@color/secondary_green" app:tint="@color/white" app:elevation="6dp" app:pressedTranslationZ="12dp" />
<!-- Bottom navigation --> <com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottom_navigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="56dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:background="@color/white" app:menu="@menu/bottom_nav_menu" app:itemIconTint="@color/primary_red" app:itemTextColor="@color/primary_red" app:elevation="8dp" />
</androidx.coordinatorlayout.widget.CoordinatorLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardCornerRadius="@dimen/card_corner_radius" app:cardElevation="@dimen/card_elevation" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_background">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Recipe image placeholder (solid color block) --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="@dimen/card_image_height" android:background="@color/watermelon_red">
<!-- Category badge --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_card_category" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|start" android:layout_margin="8dp" android:background="#80000000" android:paddingHorizontal="8dp" android:paddingVertical="4dp" android:text="Dinner" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="11sp" />
<!-- Favourite star --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_card_favourite" android:layout_width="28dp" android:layout_height="28dp" android:layout_gravity="top|end" android:layout_margin="8dp" android:src="@android:drawable/btn_star_big_off" android:contentDescription="Favourite" />
</FrameLayout>
<!-- Text content --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_card_title" style="@style/TextAppearance.RecipeBook.CardTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:text="Recipe Title" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_card_prep_time" style="@style/TextAppearance.RecipeBook.CardSubtitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:drawablePadding="4dp" android:text="30 mins" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_margin="8dp" android:clickable="true" android:focusable="true" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="4dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/card_background" app:rippleColor="@color/primary_red_light">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- Recipe image container with gradient overlay --> <FrameLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="180dp" android:background="@color/primary_red">
<!-- Gradient overlay for better text contrast --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="80dp" android:layout_gravity="bottom" android:background="@android:color/transparent" />
<!-- Category badge --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="bottom|start" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:background="#B3000000" android:paddingHorizontal="12dp" android:paddingVertical="6dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_card_category" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/card_category_placeholder" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="12sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Favourite star button --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/iv_card_favourite" android:layout_width="36dp" android:layout_height="36dp" android:layout_gravity="top|end" android:layout_margin="12dp" android:src="@android:drawable/btn_star_big_off" android:contentDescription="@string/add_to_favourites" android:scaleType="centerInside" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:padding="4dp" />
</FrameLayout>
<!-- Text content section --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<!-- Recipe title --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_card_title" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/card_title_placeholder" android:textSize="16sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary" android:ellipsize="end" android:maxLines="2" android:lineSpacingExtra="2dp" />
<!-- Prep time --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_marginTop="8dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="16dp" android:layout_height="16dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_today" android:contentDescription="@string/ingredients_label" app:tint="@color/secondary_green" android:scaleType="centerInside" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tv_card_prep_time" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/card_prep_time_placeholder" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Primary Brand Colors (Watermelon Theme) --> <color name="primary_red">#E63946</color> <color name="primary_red_light">#F1FAEE</color> <color name="primary_red_dark">#A4161A</color>
<!-- Secondary Colors --> <color name="secondary_green">#06A77D</color> <color name="secondary_green_light">#D4F4E9</color>
<!-- Accent Colors --> <color name="accent_coral">#FF6B6B</color> <color name="accent_yellow">#FFD93D</color>
<!-- Neutral Colors --> <color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="text_primary">#1A1A1A</color> <color name="text_secondary">#757575</color> <color name="text_tertiary">#9E9E9E</color> <color name="divider">#E0E0E0</color>
<!-- Background Colors --> <color name="background_primary">#FAFAFA</color> <color name="background_secondary">#F5F5F5</color> <color name="card_background">#FFFFFF</color>
<!-- Status/Semantic Colors --> <color name="success">#4CAF50</color> <color name="error">#F44336</color> <color name="warning">#FFC107</color>
<!-- Legacy naming (for backward compatibility) --> <color name="watermelon_red">#E63946</color> <color name="watermelon_green">#06A77D</color> <color name="watermelon_light">#FAFAFA</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">RecipeBook</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nav_home">Home</string> <string name="nav_discover">Discover</string> <string name="nav_favourites">Favourites</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="home_greeting">What are you cooking today?</string> <string name="search_hint">Search recipes…</string>
<!-- Recipe Detail --> <string name="ingredients_label">Ingredients</string> <string name="steps_label">Steps</string> <string name="add_to_favourites">Add to Favourites</string> <string name="remove_from_favourites">Remove from Favourites</string> <string name="edit_recipe">Edit Recipe</string>
<!-- Add / Edit Recipe --> <string name="add_recipe_title">Add New Recipe</string> <string name="edit_recipe_title">Edit Recipe</string> <string name="hint_recipe_name">Recipe Name</string> <string name="hint_ingredients">Ingredients (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_steps">Steps (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_category">Category (e.g. Breakfast, Dinner…)</string> <string name="hint_prep_time">Prep time (e.g. 30 mins)</string> <string name="btn_save">Save Recipe</string> <string name="btn_delete">Delete Recipe</string>
<!-- Favourites --> <string name="favourites_empty">No favourites yet!\nTap the ♥ on any recipe to save it.</string>
<!-- Discover --> <string name="discover_title">Discover Recipes</string>
<!-- Errors / Toasts --> <string name="error_empty_name">Please enter a recipe name.</string> <string name="error_empty_ingredients">Please enter at least one ingredient.</string> <string name="error_empty_steps">Please enter at least one step.</string> <string name="saved_success">Recipe saved!</string> <string name="deleted_success">Recipe deleted.</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <string name="app_name">RecipeBook</string>
<!-- Navigation --> <string name="nav_home">Home</string> <string name="nav_discover">Discover</string> <string name="nav_favourites">Favourites</string>
<!-- Home Screen --> <string name="home_greeting_morning">Good morning! What are you cooking?</string> <string name="home_greeting_afternoon">Good afternoon! Let\'s find a recipe</string> <string name="home_greeting_evening">Good evening! Ready to cook?</string> <string name="search_hint">Search recipes…</string> <string name="empty_state_title">No recipes yet</string> <string name="empty_state_subtitle">Start by adding your first recipe</string> <string name="empty_state_action">Create Recipe</string> <string name="no_search_results">No recipes found</string> <string name="recipes_count">%d recipes</string>
<!-- Recipe Detail --> <string name="ingredients_label">Ingredients</string> <string name="steps_label">Steps</string> <string name="add_to_favourites">Add to Favourites</string> <string name="remove_from_favourites">Remove from Favourites</string> <string name="edit_recipe">Edit Recipe</string>
<!-- Add / Edit Recipe --> <string name="add_recipe_title">Add New Recipe</string> <string name="edit_recipe_title">Edit Recipe</string> <string name="hint_recipe_name">Recipe Name</string> <string name="hint_ingredients">Ingredients (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_steps">Steps (one per line)</string> <string name="hint_category">Category (e.g. Breakfast, Dinner…)</string> <string name="hint_prep_time">Prep time (e.g. 30 mins)</string> <string name="btn_save">Save Recipe</string> <string name="btn_delete">Delete Recipe</string>
<!-- Favourites --> <string name="favourites_empty">No favourites yet!\nTap the ♥ on any recipe to save it.</string>
<!-- Recipe Card --> <string name="card_category_placeholder">Dinner</string> <string name="card_prep_time_placeholder">30 mins</string> <string name="card_title_placeholder">Recipe Title</string>
<!-- Discover --> <string name="discover_title">Discover Recipes</string>
<!-- Errors / Toasts --> <string name="error_empty_name">Please enter a recipe name.</string> <string name="error_empty_ingredients">Please enter at least one ingredient.</string> <string name="error_empty_steps">Please enter at least one step.</string> <string name="saved_success">Recipe saved!</string> <string name="deleted_success">Recipe deleted.</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <style name="Theme.RecipeBook" parent="Theme.MaterialComponents.DayNight.DarkActionBar"> <!-- Primary brand color --> <item name="colorPrimary">@color/primary_red</item> <item name="colorPrimaryVariant">@color/primary_red_dark</item> <item name="colorSecondary">@color/secondary_green</item> <item name="colorSecondaryVariant">@color/secondary_green</item> <item name="colorError">@color/error</item>
<!-- Text colors --> <item name="android:textColorPrimary">@color/text_primary</item> <item name="android:textColorSecondary">@color/text_secondary</item>
<!-- Background --> <item name="android:windowBackground">@color/background_primary</item>
<!-- App Bar --> <item name="windowActionBar">false</item> <item name="windowNoTitle">true</item> </style>
<!-- Text Appearance Styles --> <style name="TextAppearance.RecipeBook.CardTitle" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Headline6"> <item name="android:textSize">16sp</item> <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item> <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item> </style>
<style name="TextAppearance.RecipeBook.CardSubtitle" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Body2"> <item name="android:textSize">13sp</item> <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_secondary</item> </style>
<style name="TextAppearance.RecipeBook.SectionHeader" parent="TextAppearance.MaterialComponents.Headline6"> <item name="android:textSize">18sp</item> <item name="android:textStyle">bold</item> <item name="android:textColor">@color/text_primary</item> </style>
<!-- Widget Styles --> <style name="Widget.RecipeBook.Toolbar" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.AppBarLayout.Primary"> <item name="backgroundColor">@color/primary_red</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.RecipeBook.TextInputLayout" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.TextInputLayout.OutlinedBox"> <item name="boxStrokeColor">@color/divider</item> <item name="hintTextColor">@color/text_secondary</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Primary" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/white</item> <item name="backgroundTint">@color/primary_red</item> </style>
<style name="Widget.RecipeBook.Button.Outlined" parent="Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton"> <item name="android:textColor">@color/primary_red</item> <item name="strokeColor">@color/primary_red</item> </style> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # AndroidX package structure to make it clearer which packages are bundled with the # Android operating system, and which are packaged with your app's APK # https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/support-library/androidx-rn android.useAndroidX=true # Enables namespacing of each library's R class so that its R class includes only the # resources declared in the library itself and none from the library's dependencies, # thereby reducing the size of the R class for that library android.nonTransitiveRClass=true

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: # Project-wide Gradle settings. # IDE (e.g. Android Studio) users: # Gradle settings configured through the IDE *will override* # any settings specified in this file. # For more details on how to configure your build environment visit # http://www.gradle.org/docs/current/userguide/build_environment.html # Specifies the JVM arguments used for the daemon process. # The setting is particularly useful for tweaking memory settings. org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m -Dfile.encoding=UTF-8 # Configure Gradle to use the embedded JDK from Android Studio org.gradle.java.home=/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home # When configured, Gradle will run in incubating parallel mode. # This option should only be used with decoupled projects. For more details, visit # https://developer.android.com/r/tools/gradle-multi-project-decoupled-projects # org.gradle.parallel=true # AndroidX package structure to make it clearer which packages are bundled with the # Android operating system, and which are packaged with your app's APK # https://developer.android.com/topic/libraries/support-library/androidx-rn android.useAndroidX=true # Enables namespacing of each library's R class so that its R class includes only the # resources declared in the library itself and none from the library's dependencies, # thereby reducing the size of the R class for that library android.nonTransitiveRClass=true
